Did you know...?

*Did you know that Dai-Kaio-Shin is fused with someone. (If you don't know who Dai-Kaio-Shin is he's the old man that teches Gohan and new style and introduces him tot he Z sword). Well anywayz... A long time ago when he looked young kinda like Kaio-Shin he was sitting by a tree reading japaneese manga(comics), when an old witch stole one of his earings. These earings have the abilty to fuse two people wearing it. It has a permanent effect, kinda like a fusion, but instead of a 30 minuti fuse the 2 victims are fused FOREVER! Thats why Dai-Kaio-Shin looks old.

*Did you know before Planet Vegeta was Planet Vegeta it was inhabited by Tsufuru-jins and the planet was called Planet Plant. Read more about the destruction of the Tsufuru-jin and the planet below at the Section "What is a Tsufuru-jin".


If you ever had written a story, like a long novel, you may think...This is great no errors and its perfect. But you might have forgotten the facts you have to stay with and it will change the story around. If you dont understand read the following...

* Dragonball Z tells of a Super Saiyan, who appears every 1000 years. Gokou is shown to be this Saiyan, so he is supposed to be the only one able to reach Super Saiyan level.

Unexplained:How come as the story progresses Gohan, Trunks,Vegeta,and Goten are able to reach Super Saiyan.

*Trying to cover this up, Movie 8 introduces Brolly, the Legendary Saiyan who apears every 1000 years.

Unexplained: It is shown that Gokou can indeed reach SSJ2 and SSJ3 mode, and that Gohan can reach SSJ2 mode too.

*To try to cover up this error, another term is introduced- the legendary Saiyan who appears every 1000 years- and that is Gokou when he reaches Super Gokou 4 mode.

*When Cell exploded, he regenerated from a single surviving brain cell.

Unexplained: Cell's entire upper body (including the head and thus the brain) was blown away in an episode, but he still was able regenerate (without a brain cell).

*In the Boo Series, Gohan trained to become Mystic Gohan, a stage where he was able to become stronger than reaching Super Saiyan form. Therefore, he does not reach SSJ mode when he fights Boo.

Unexplained: Gohan reaches SSJ form once again in Dragonball GT.


Ages

Master Roshi was 307 years old when Gokou was born.
Master Roshi began to go perverted at 123 years old, when he began buying porno magazines.
Granpa Gohan was 79 years old when he found Gokou in the forest.
Klilyn is 1 year older than Gokou.
Bulma, Yamcha, and Tenshin-han are 4 years older than Gokou.
Bulma was 16 years old when she met Gokou.
Trunks was 8 years old during Boo Series.
Goten is 1 year younger than Trunks.
Pan was 5 years old when Dragonball Z ended. At the beginning of Dragonball GT, she was 14.
Bra was 4 years old when Dragonball Z ended.
The first Tenkaichi Budoukai was held 87 years before Gokou was ooohhage of 16.
Dende was 5 years old when he first appeared.
Kami was over 900 years old when he fused with Piccolo.

Unexplained: Kami is the creator of the Earth dragonballs. He is only around 900 years old. However, it was stated earlier that the dragonballs have been around for thousands of years.

The Boo Series takes place 7 years after the Cell Series.

Who Are the Tsufuru-jin?

Well, while the Tsufuru-jin never show up in the Dragonball manga, they did make an appearance in DBZ TV episode #20. There really isn't that much about them Finally, they become an integral part of Dragon Ball GT, starting with the appearance of Baby.

The Saiya-jin were a vicious race of brutish monkey-humanoids that landed on the planet inhabited by the Tsufuru-jin. The Tsufuru-jin, on the other hand, were a more advanced race that had developed a very sophisticated technology.

History of the Saiya-jin (as seen in the anime version) The Saiya-jin, strongest warriors in the universe! Presenting their worldview and data as it only appears in the anime.

The Tsufuru-jin battle the Saiya-jin! We see that the Scouters were the product of Tsufuru science.

The Saiya-jin tricked the Tsufuru-jin, and used their technology. As a result, the advancement of science slumped following the massacre of the Tsufuru-jin. The Saiya-jin joined forces with Freeza, and managed to get weapons and such as compensation for their conquests.

Planet Vejiita, with a gravity ten times greater than Earth's, became home to the Saiya-jin. A full moon appears only once every eight years. It was during this time that the Saiya-jin turned into Oozaru ("big monkeys") and massacred the Tsufuru-jin.The Tsufuru-jin, though small in stature, possessed a superior intellectual capacity.

Barbaric Saiya-jin, ancestors of today's Saiya-jin. At the time, they were still a dim people of few numbers, who knew only violence.

Who were the Saiya-jin wanderers?

Originally, Planet Vegeta was known as Planet Plant, and was populated by the Tsufuru-jin. One day, a drifting spaceship carrying a race of people with tails landed on the planet. These were the primitive Saiya-jin, the "roots" of the current race. However, the reason these primitive Saiya-jin were drifting through space is a mystery. The Saiya-jin's true home planet is also unknown.

Even King Vejiita, who oversaw the extermination of the Tsufuru-jin, was uncomfortable with Freeza, but he still followed him. Gokuu, if he hadn't come to Earth, might also have become a fearsome warrior.The name of Vejiita is a symbol of power and authority.

The family of Vejiita rests at the top of the Saiya-jin line of authority. Below them come the elite warriors of the noble class, and at the bottom come the lower-class fighters; this is how the social structure is comprised. The Royal Family, by the way, was not formed until after the extermination of the Tsufuru-jin. The first King was Vejiita's father, King Vejiita, and his descendants were to ascend to his throne.


Bra & Pan

Did you know Bra and Pan have the ability to Super Saiya-jin but do not put in use. They are the only Saiyans who have not turned Super Saiya-jin. If the did what stage would it be?I f you have a suggestion on what it could be called e-mail me and ill post what you though on my page.
